title: Uncedo kunye neNkxaso
description: Silapha ukunceda ngayo nayiphi na imibuzo okanye imiba onokudibana nayo ngelixa usebenzisa usetyenziso lwethu lwewebhu. Nokuba ufuna uncedo lokuqalisa, unombuzo malunga nefitsha, okanye ufuna ukuxela isiphene, silapha ukukunceda.

contact.title: Qhagamshelana neNkxaso
contact.emailDesc: Sijonge ukuphendula kuzo zonke ii-imeyile kwiiyure ezingama-24.
contact.footer: Enkosi ngokukhetha usetyenziso lwethu lwewebhu. Sizimisele ukwenza amava akho agudileyo kwaye onwabe kangangoko.

detailedFeatures.title: INkxaso yeMpawu eneenkcukacha
detailedFeatures.subtitle: Ukwahlulwa koFakelo lweLizwi kunye neTeksti-ukuya-kwiNtetho yobunakho ngesixhobo ngasinye.
